Localization.Description: A query passed through the proxy server

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A client query from host {src.host} is rejected by the proxy server on host {event_src.host} according to the access control lists
A client query from host {src.host} received a response from the proxy server cache on host {event_src.host}
A client query from host {src.host} passed through the proxy server on host {event_src.host}
